item.title: 美国2月CPI报告核心要点
item.description: 以下是周三发布的美国2月消费者价格指数报告中的关键要点：【原文：Here are key takeaways from the US February consumer price index report released Wednesday:】

item.title: 高盛分析师弗拉德认为股市存在"极端"反弹潜力
item.description: 高盛集团交易部门指出，对冲基金在美国股市的布局已为股价在近期震荡后大幅攀升奠定基础。【原文：Hedge fund positioning across US equities has created a setup for stocks to rip higher after their recent wobble, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s trading desk.】

item.title: Grubhub将开展为期三个月的限时无人机送餐测试
item.description: Grubhub将首次测试外卖订单的无人机配送服务，这标志着该公司最新尝试自动化技术的举措。【原文：Grubhub will test drone delivery of takeout orders for the first time, marking the latest effort from the company to experiment with automation technologies.】

item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡追踪：伊朗超大型油轮及与中国有关联的船舶穿越波斯湾
item.description: 尽管主流西方船运仍基本暂停通过霍尔木兹海峡，但近期24小时监测显示，与伊朗相关的航运活动略有增加，特别是两艘受制裁的超大型油轮（VLCC）的活动。【原文：While mainstream Western shipping remains largely suspended through the Strait of Hormuz, recent 24-hour observations reveal a slight increase in Iran-linked traffic, specifically involving two sanctioned VLCCs.】

item.title: 甲骨文公司强劲财报后信用风险降至一个月低点
item.description: 甲骨文公司周三公布季度财报后，投资者对人工智能相关资本支出的担忧有所缓解，该公司一项关键信用风险指标录得2月2日以来最大涨幅。【原文：A key gauge of Oracle Corp.’s credit risk improved the most since Feb. 2 on Wednesday, after the database giant’s quarterly report helped ease investor fears about AI-related capital spending.】

item.title: Salesforce启动八部分美国高级债券发行
item.description: Salesforce公司启动了自2021年以来首次在美国发行的投资级债券，用于回购股票，此举将检验投资者对软件行业债务的兴趣。【原文：Salesforce Inc. kicked off its first US investment-grade bond sale since 2021 to fund a share buyback, testing investor appetite for software-sector debt.】

item.title: 美国核心通胀率如预期放缓，伊朗战争前夕
item.description: 美国2月份核心通胀率较上月有所放缓，在与伊朗开战前缓解了部分价格压力。【原文：Underlying US inflation slowed in February from a month earlier, offering some relief from price pressures before the war with Iran.】

item.title: 债券交易员趁机买入遭抛售重创的英国国债
item.description: 自中东冲突爆发以来，英国债券遭遇剧烈抛售，这对少数敢于承受波动的投资者而言，恰是绝佳的买入良机。【原文：A dramatic selloff in the UK’s bonds since conflict broke out in the Middle East is a buying opportunity for a handful of investors willing to brave the volatility.】

item.title: 莫斯科互联网中断事件考验俄罗斯不断扩大的网络管控
item.description: 俄罗斯首都正遭遇大范围移动互联网中断，当局似乎正在测试对该国网络基础设施的进一步管控措施。【原文：Russia’s capital has been facing widespread mobile internet outages, as authorities appear to be testing further controls over the country’s web infrastructure.】

item.title: 瑞典因地缘政治担忧加剧下调2026年经济增长预期
item.description: 瑞典政府预测称，由于中东战争导致家庭消费更加谨慎，今年该国经济复苏速度可能低于此前预期。【原文：Sweden’s economic rebound will likely be slower this year than expected earlier as the war in the Middle East makes households more wary, according to a government forecast.】

item.title: 美国盘前活跃股：AeroVironment、金宝汤、耐克、甲骨文
item.description: 截至纽约时间上午7点58分，标普500指数期货下跌约0.1%。据知情人士透露，国际能源署正考虑释放紧急石油储备，这将是该机构历史上规模最大的一次。【原文：S&P 500 Index futures are down about 0.1% as of 7:58 a.m. in New York. The International Energy Agency is considering a release of emergency oil reserves that would be the largest-ever in its history, according to a person familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 英伟达将向人工智能数据中心专家Nebius投资20亿美元
item.description: 英伟达公司将向Nebius集团投资20亿美元，作为双方建立战略合作伙伴关系的一部分，共同开发和建设人工智能数据中心。这家全球市值最高的企业正持续向采购其芯片的公司注入资金。【原文：Nvidia Corp. will invest $2 billion in Nebius Group NV as part of a strategic partnership to develop and build artificial intelligence data centers, as the world’s most valuable firm continues to pour money into companies that buy its chips.】

item.title: 全球化仍在继续，新报告显示
item.description: DHL-纽约大学研究显示，货物、投资和人员仍在跨境广泛流动【原文：DHL-NYU study shows goods, investment and people are still flowing broadly across borders】

item.title: 优步与亚马逊旗下Zoox达成合作，推出无人驾驶出租车服务
item.description: 优步科技公司将于今年夏天起在拉斯维加斯率先推出服务，允许乘客通过亚马逊旗下Zoox公司召唤无人驾驶出租车。【原文：Uber Technologies Inc. will let customers hail robotaxis from Amazon.com Inc.’s Zoox, starting in Las Vegas this summer.】

item.title: 美国期货交投清淡，因伊朗战争持续，投资者静候CPI数据
item.description: 美国股市期货在周三开盘前震荡波动，因中东冲突持续发酵，且关键战略要冲霍尔木兹海峡发生油轮袭击事件，导致原油价格突破每桶90美元大关。【原文：US stock futures churned before Wednesday’s bell as the conflict in the Middle East continued and crude topped $90 a barrel amid vessel attacks in the crucial Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 美国炼油商因中东减产面临压力
item.description: 美国作为全球最大原油生产国的地位，并未使其免于战争的冲击。【原文：America’s position as the largest crude producer hasn’t spared it from war repercussions.】

item.title: 信实集团从特朗普的对手变为盟友，承诺投资炼油厂
item.description: 信实工业有限公司一举重置了与唐纳德·特朗普的关系。【原文：In one move, Reliance Industries Ltd. has reset its relationship with Donald Trump.】

item.title: 法国健康初创企业Alan融资后估值突破50亿欧元
item.description: 法国健康保险初创企业Alan宣布完成新一轮融资，融资额超过1亿欧元（约合1.16亿美元），公司估值突破50亿欧元。【原文：French health-insurance startup Alan has raised more than €100 million ($116 million) at a valuation above €5 billion, according to a company statement.】

item.title: 私募股权无法超越公开市场，即便没有7级地震
item.description: 最新报告显示，过去五年间，私募股权投资者若将资金投向公开市场，收益将更为可观——即便剔除所谓"七大巨头股"的收益也是如此。【原文：Private equity investors would have been better off parking their money in the public markets over the last five years, even when gains from the so-called Magnificent 7 stocks are stripped out, a new report shows.】

item.title: 雀巢前首席执行官弗雷克塞仍在网上使用其旧头衔
item.description: 雀巢公司的真正首席执行官请站出来——在领英上。【原文：Will the real chief executive officer of Nestlé SA please stand up? On LinkedIn that is.】

item.title: 美国CPI报告将揭示伊朗战争前通胀状况
item.description: 加利福尼亚州戴利城塞拉蒙特购物中心内，顾客正在店内购物。摄影师：David Paul Morris/彭博社【原文：Shoppers inside a store in the Serramonte Mall in Daly City, California. Photographer: David Paul Morris/Bloomberg】

item.title: 华尔街交易员在战乱持续中探底
item.description: 华尔街交易员正紧盯图表，试图判断在战火持续蔓延的中东局势下，标普500指数可能进一步下跌的幅度。技术分析师指出，市场已显现出看跌动能的早期迹象。【原文：Wall Street traders are poring over charts to determine how much further the S&P 500 Index might fall as war in the Middle East rages on, with technical analysts noting early signs of bearish momentum.】

item.title: 甲骨文应对现金短缺的新举措：自带芯片
item.description: 该公司表示，数据中心客户将承担昂贵人工智能芯片的预付成本。【原文：The company says data center customers will pay the upfront cost of expensive AI chips】

item.title: 伊朗战争对中国再通胀努力构成双刃剑风险
item.description: 中国有能力应对能源成本上升，但出口若受冲击将拖累经济增长。【原文：China is well placed to cope with higher energy costs, but any blow to exports would dent growth】

item.title: 杰富瑞连续押错方向，面临诉讼与判断质疑
item.description: 从虚构的水处理设备到伪造的发票，企业破产的残骸正将杰富瑞金融集团的激进经营方式公之于众，各公司正竭力追回损失的数百万美元。【原文：From phantom water machines to faked invoices, a trail of corporate wreckage is pushing Jefferies Financial Group Inc.’s hard-charging ways into public view as firms fight to recoup their lost millions.】

item.title: 邦吉公司称伊朗战争引发的农产品价格上涨正推动农场销售
item.description: 邦吉全球公司表示，中东冲突正推高美国农作物的价格，同时给包括石油和化肥在内的全球贸易流动带来剧烈冲击。【原文：Bunge Global SA said the conflict in the Middle East is lifting crop prices for US farmers even as it causes upheaval to global trade flows, including oil and fertilizer.】

item.title: 美国抵押贷款利率攀升至6.19%，创9月以来最大涨幅
item.description: 上周美国抵押贷款利率创下自9月以来最大涨幅，这对今年一直受益于融资成本下降的房地产市场构成打击。【原文：US mortgage rates increased last week by the most since September, a setback for a housing market that had been enjoying easing financing costs this year.】

item.title: 礼来将投资30亿美元于中国以推动减肥药研发
item.description: 礼来公司将在未来十年内向中国投资30亿美元，扩大本地生产规模，重点布局减肥领域。这家美国制药巨头正致力于巩固其在蓬勃发展的肥胖症市场中的主导地位。【原文：Eli Lilly & Co will invest $3 billion in China over the next decade to expand local production, with a focus on weight loss as the US drugmaker looks to cement its dominance in the booming obesity market.】

item.title: 壳牌宣布卡塔尔液化天然气合同不可抗力
item.description: 据知情人士透露，由于卡塔尔液化天然气持续停产，壳牌公司已对其部分亚洲客户的液化天然气合同宣布不可抗力。【原文：Shell Plc has declared force majeure on its liquefied natural gas contracts with some of its customers in Asia, according to people familiar with the matter, due to the ongoing Qatar LNG shutdown.】

item.title: 印度总理莫迪呼吁减少对进口能源的依赖
item.description: 印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪表示，随着中东战争给这个全球第三大石油消费国的政策制定者带来挑战，印度需要实现自给自足，减少对进口能源的依赖。【原文：India needs to become self-reliant and less dependent on imported energy, Prime Minister Narendra Modi said as the war in the Middle East poses a challenge for policymakers in the world’s third-largest oil consumer.】
